Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and versions, leading to more stable game updates.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how timestamps are formatted in strings dynamically.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves readability of time-related information for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance and speed in loading updates.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the handling of timestamp strings for faster processing.
Changed_Other.purpose: Reduces lag and improves performance when dealing with time-related data.

Added_Physics.name: FFlagHumanoidParentNil_Staged
Added_Physics.mechanism: Allows for better handling of humanoid objects when their parent is not set.
Added_Physics.purpose: Enhances character behavior and reduces glitches in gameplay for players.
